description: Azure CLI commands for subscription analysis, resource management, and operations. These commands are read-only operations for analyzing Azure subscriptions.

best_practices: Use --query to filter results with JMESPath
Always specify --resource-group when targeting specific resources

patterns.reason: Use native --query instead of piping to jq when possible
Use JMESPath filtering instead of grep for better performance

actions.message: Azure CLI context loaded. Use 'az account show' to verify active subscription before running analysis commands.
